accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and accurately describe the SUPPORT Act amendment and funding levels.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; context about the SUPPORT Act is accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill reauthorizes funding for a youth prevention and recovery initiative.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies the amendment to section 7102(c)(9) of the SUPPORT Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no material exceptions or carve-outs.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the fiscal years covered and absence of a separate effective date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: replacing the authorization with new FY2026-2030 funding levels.

concise.why: No padding or filler; appropriately brief.

correct_entities.why: SUPPORT Act and section 7102(c)(9) are correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: All dollar amounts and fiscal years match the bill text exactly.
